title: argyranthemum frutescens subsp. gracilescens
intro: Argyranthemum frutescens subsp. gracilescens, also known as the white daisy or Marguerite, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Argyranthemum frutescens subsp. gracilescens include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
